sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48512" key="qesmo/qetis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεσμόθετ-ις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεσμοφόρος</foreign>, title of Demeter, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28</biblScope> </bibl>; of Isis, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Hymn.Is.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
